name: UnSeen
short_description: UnSeen : you won't see death coming. A first person horror game about immersion, where truth and madness are never far away. Be careful... fear is on your feet.
detailed_description:
WILL YOU FIND SALVATION?

In UnSeen, death is invisible. Explore a first-person horror and atmosphere game, where truth is never far from madness, and where fear follows in your steps.

The members of the Heartwood family all suffer from a curious form of paranoia: the certainty of being cursed, pursued by a force as invisible as it is unstoppable.

Between superstition and truth, will you be able to put an end to the terror on your heels?

Non-linear progression
Explore a vast mansion as you wish. Open up routes, dissect its secrets. The key to success lies in your ability to orient yourself.

Feel the Lovecraftian Fear
Between the supernatural and madness, dive into a tale of the strange with nightmarish implications.

Will you be up to the task?
